name: Void Wretch

abilities.name: Demise (Void Ghost)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may remove a friendly Scheme or Echo marker within LoS. If it does so, make a copy of the marker in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

actions.name: Ponder Existence
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this model has no cards in its control hand, this action receives a (-).

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Onward
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Walk Action.

extraction_notes: Health bar shows STN: 7 with numbered pips 1-6 visible, confirming 7 health total
